---
title: "RSA_day9"
author: "Zulema Carracedo Lorenzo"
date: "2025-03-06"
output: html_document
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
#data management
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(readxl)
library(flextable)

#statistics
library(multcompView)
library(vegan)
library(pairwiseAdonis)
library(emmeans)
library(DHARMa) #for simmulate residuals
library(glmmTMB) #for glmm
library(car)

#plots
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpattern)
library(rempsyc) #for tables
library(fitdistrplus)

# packages needed for Cohen's D
library(effsize)  
library(effectsize)
library(lsr)

#for tables
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(car)
library(emmeans)
library(multcomp)

```


```{r}

#Import data

RSA <- readxl::read_xlsx("./1_Arabidopsis_different_pseudomonas_exp/data/processed/RSA_day9.xlsx")
RSA <- as.data.frame(RSA)

metadata <- readxl::read_xlsx("./1_Arabidopsis_different_pseudomonas_exp/data/raw/metadata.xlsx")
metadata <- as.data.frame(metadata)


str(RSA)
str(metadata)


RSA[,1:3] <- lapply(RSA[,1:3], as.factor)
RSA[,4:6] <- lapply(RSA[,4:6], as.numeric)
metadata[,1:3] <- lapply(metadata[,1:3], as.factor)



#str(RSA) 
#str(data) #ok



#add metadata to RSA

RSA <- merge(metadata, RSA, by = "plate_id")



```

#Convert the pixel data to mm

```{r}
RSA <- RSA %>% mutate(Total_Length_mm = (Total_Length_px*0.0635))
RSA <- RSA %>% mutate(Length_Primary_roots_mm = (Length_Primary_roots_px*0.0635))

#pics were 400dpi
```


#Arrange data for plots

```{r}

RSA$media <- factor(RSA$media, levels=c("control", "sorbitol"))
RSA$treatment <- factor(RSA$treatment, levels=c("Ctrl", "WCS417", "WCS315", "CHA0"))

```

#colors

```{r}
control <- #76CFE8
WCS417 <- #C9DC53
WCS315 <- #F99F58
CHA0 <- #9771A5
```

#Plots

```{r}
##Primary root length

ggplot(RSA, aes(x = treatment, y = Length_Primary_roots_mm, fill = treatment)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "treatment", values = c("#76CFE8", "#C9DC53", "#F99F58", "#9771A5")) +
  ylab("Primary root length (mm)") +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(), alpha=0.5, size = 2) + 
  theme_bw(18) + 
  theme(legend.position="top") +
  guides(fill= FALSE) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +  # Force y-axis to start at 0
  facet_wrap(~media, nrow=1)


mapply(function(x)
  ggsave(
  plot = last_plot(),
  filename =x,
  path = "./1_Arabidopsis_different_pseudomonas_exp/results/plots",
  scale = 1.8,
  width = 150,
  height = 100,
  units = "mm",
  dpi = 300),
x=c("Fig.1A_primary_length.svg","Fig.1A_primary_length.png"))


##lateral root count

ggplot(RSA, aes(x = treatment, y = Lateral_Root_Count, fill = treatment)) +
  scale_fill_manual(name = "treatment", values = c("#76CFE8", "#C9DC53", "#F99F58", "#9771A5")) +
  ylab("Lateral root count") +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitterdodge(), alpha=0.5, size = 2) + 
  theme_bw(18) + 
  theme(legend.position="top") +
  guides(fill= FALSE) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        panel.background = element_blank()) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +  # Force y-axis to start at 0
  facet_wrap(~media, nrow=1)


mapply(function(x)
  ggsave(
  plot = last_plot(),
  filename =x,
  path = "./1_Arabidopsis_different_pseudomonas_exp/results/plots",
  scale = 1.8,
  width = 150,
  height = 100,
  units = "mm",
  dpi = 300),
x=c("Fig.1A_root_count.svg","Fig.1A_root_count.png"))


```


#GLMM
##Primary root length
### Control


```{r}
# 1/2MS

data_control <- RSA %>%
  filter(media == "control")

# Data distribution

aovx <- aov(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm ~ data_control$treatment)
shapiro.test(aovx$residuals)
# normaal

hist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm)

boxplot(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm)

# Visualize data
plotdist(log(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm))

# Test the different distributions
normal <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "norm")
summary(normal)

gamma <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "gamma") 
summary(gamma)

poisson <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "pois")
summary(poisson)

exponential <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "exp")
summary(exponential)

nonbinom <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "nbinom")
summary(nonbinom)

lnormal <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "lnorm")
summary(lnormal)

logi <- fitdist(data_control$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "logis")
summary(logi)

# Compare the different distributions
gofstat(list(normal, exponential, gamma, lnormal, logi), 
        fitnames=c("normal", "exponential", "gamma", "lnormal", "logis"))

# conclusion: logis

###### Generalized linear mixed models

lmmx <- glmmTMB(Length_Primary_roots_mm ~ treatment + (1|plate_id), 
                 data=data_control, na.action=na.omit,
                 family = gaussian(link = "log"))

plot(resid(lmmx))
plot(simulateResiduals(lmmx)) 

# Res Identification for batch
res <-simulateResiduals(lmmx, plot = T) # check for overdispersion
testResiduals(res) # tests distribution, dispersion and outliers, testUniformity() - tests if the overall distribution conforms to expectations
testDispersion(res) # tests under and overdispersion (big spread in data, red bar is way off of distribution of data (res))
testZeroInflation(res)
testOutliers(res, type = 'bootstrap')

# Results

summary(lmmx) # final model 

# Perform Type III ANOVA
glmm_table <- Anova(lmmx, type = "III")

# Convert to dataframe and add factor names
anova_df <- as.data.frame(glmm_table)
anova_df$Factor <- rownames(anova_df)

# Round Chi-sq and p-value columns
anova_df$Chisq <- round(anova_df$Chisq, 2)

# Round p-values and format small values (<0.001)
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- round(as.numeric(as.character(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`)), 3)  # round to 3 decimals
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- ifelse(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.001, "< 0.001", formatC(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`, format = "f", digits = 3))

# Reorder columns: Factor first
anova_df <- anova_df[, c("Factor", "Chisq", "Df", "Pr(>Chisq)")]

# Create flextable (no need for p_numeric in conditional formatting)
anova_ft <- flextable(anova_df) |> 
  set_header_labels(
    Factor = "Factor",
    Chisq = "Chi²",
    Df = "DF",
    `Pr(>Chisq)` = "p-value"
  ) |> 
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ as.numeric(as.character(`Pr(>Chisq)`)) < 0.05, part = "body")

# Post-hoc / pairwise comparisons using emmeans
emmeans_result <- emmeans(lmmx, pairwise ~ treatment, adjust = "tukey")
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_result$contrasts)

# Pairwise comparisons flextable
pairwise_ft <- flextable(emmeans_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = c("estimate", "SE", "t.ratio", "p.value"), digits = 3) |>
  set_header_labels(
    contrast = "Contrast", estimate = "Estimate", SE = "SE",
    df = "DF", t.ratio = "t-ratio", p.value = "p-value"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ p.value < 0.05, part = "body")

# CLD result
cld_result <- multcomp::cld(emmeans_result, adjust = "sidak", Letters = letters)
cld_df <- as.data.frame(cld_result)

# Compact letter display (CLD) flextable
cld_ft <- flextable(cld_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = "emmean", digits = 2) |>
  set_header_labels(
    treatment = "Treatment", emmean = "Estimated Mean", .group = "Group"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs()

# Export stats table to Word document
doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Table 1. Type III ANOVA Results", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(anova_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 2. Pairwise Comparisons (Tukey)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(pairwise_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 3. Compact Letter Display (CLD)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(cld_ft)

# Save to Word document

print(doc, target = "model_results_prim_root_control.docx")

```

###Sorbitol

```{r}
# sorbitol

data_sorbitol <- RSA %>%
  filter(media == "sorbitol")
  

# Data distribution

aovx <- aov(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm ~ data_sorbitol$treatment)
shapiro.test(aovx$residuals)
# not normaal

hist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm)

boxplot(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm)

# Visualize data
plotdist(log(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm))

# Test the different distributions
normal <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "norm")
summary(normal)

gamma <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "gamma") 
summary(gamma)

poisson <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "pois")
summary(poisson)

exponential <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "exp")
summary(exponential)

nonbinom <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "nbinom")
summary(nonbinom)

lnormal <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "lnorm")
summary(lnormal)

logi <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Length_Primary_roots_mm, "logis")
summary(logi)

# Compare the different distributions
gofstat(list(normal, exponential, gamma, lnormal, logi), 
        fitnames=c("normal", "exponential", "gamma", "lnormal", "logis"))

# conclusion: normal

###### Generalized linear mixed models

lmmx <- glmmTMB(Length_Primary_roots_mm ~ treatment + (1|plate_id), 
                 data=data_sorbitol, na.action=na.omit,
                 family = gaussian())

plot(resid(lmmx))
plot(simulateResiduals(lmmx)) #DHARMa: qgam was unable to calculate quantile regression for quantile 0.25. Possibly to few (unique) data points / predictions. The quantile will be ommited in plots and significance calculations. 

# Res Identification for batch
res <-simulateResiduals(lmmx, plot = T) # check for overdispersion
testResiduals(res) # tests distribution, dispersion and outliers, testUniformity() - tests if the overall distribution conforms to expectations
testDispersion(res) # tests under and overdispersion (big spread in data, red bar is way off of distribution of data (res))
testZeroInflation(res)
testOutliers(res, type = 'bootstrap')

# Results

summary(lmmx) # final model 

# Perform Type III ANOVA
glmm_table <- Anova(lmmx, type = "III")

# Convert to dataframe and add factor names
anova_df <- as.data.frame(glmm_table)
anova_df$Factor <- rownames(anova_df)

# Round Chi-sq and p-value columns
anova_df$Chisq <- round(anova_df$Chisq, 2)

# Round p-values and format small values (<0.001)
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- round(as.numeric(as.character(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`)), 3)  # round to 3 decimals
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- ifelse(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.001, "< 0.001", formatC(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`, format = "f", digits = 3))

# Reorder columns: Factor first
anova_df <- anova_df[, c("Factor", "Chisq", "Df", "Pr(>Chisq)")]

# Create flextable (no need for p_numeric in conditional formatting)
anova_ft <- flextable(anova_df) |> 
  set_header_labels(
    Factor = "Factor",
    Chisq = "Chi²",
    Df = "DF",
    `Pr(>Chisq)` = "p-value"
  ) |> 
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ as.numeric(as.character(`Pr(>Chisq)`)) < 0.05, part = "body")

# Post-hoc / pairwise comparisons using emmeans
emmeans_result <- emmeans(lmmx, pairwise ~ treatment, adjust = "tukey")
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_result$contrasts)

# Pairwise comparisons flextable
pairwise_ft <- flextable(emmeans_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = c("estimate", "SE", "t.ratio", "p.value"), digits = 3) |>
  set_header_labels(
    contrast = "Contrast", estimate = "Estimate", SE = "SE",
    df = "DF", t.ratio = "t-ratio", p.value = "p-value"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ p.value < 0.05, part = "body")

# CLD result
cld_result <- multcomp::cld(emmeans_result, adjust = "sidak", Letters = letters)
cld_df <- as.data.frame(cld_result)

# Compact letter display (CLD) flextable
cld_ft <- flextable(cld_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = "emmean", digits = 2) |>
  set_header_labels(
    treatment = "Treatment", emmean = "Estimated Mean", .group = "Group"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs()

# Export stats table to Word document
doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Table 1. Type III ANOVA Results", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(anova_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 2. Pairwise Comparisons (Tukey)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(pairwise_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 3. Compact Letter Display (CLD)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(cld_ft)

# Save to Word document

print(doc, target = "model_results_prim_root_sorbitol.docx")
```


##Lateral root count
### Control


```{r}
#  1/2MS

data_control <- RSA %>%
  filter(media == "control") 

# Data distribution

aovx <- aov(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count ~ data_control$treatment)
shapiro.test(aovx$residuals)
# normaal

hist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count )

boxplot(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count)

# Visualize data
plotdist(log(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count))

# Test the different distributions
normal <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "norm")
summary(normal)

gamma <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "gamma") 
summary(gamma)

poisson <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "pois")
summary(poisson)

exponential <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "exp")
summary(exponential)

nonbinom <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "nbinom")
summary(nonbinom)

lnormal <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "lnorm")
summary(lnormal)

logi <- fitdist(data_control$Lateral_Root_Count, "logis")
summary(logi)

# Compare the different distributions
gofstat(list(normal, exponential, gamma, lnormal, logi, poisson), 
        fitnames=c("normal", "exponential", "gamma", "lnormal", "logis", "poisson"))

# conclusion: normal

###### Generalized linear mixed models

lmmx <- glmmTMB(Lateral_Root_Count ~ treatment + (1|plate_id), 
                 data=data_control, na.action=na.omit,
                 family = gaussian())

plot(resid(lmmx))
plot(simulateResiduals(lmmx))  

# Res Identification for batch
res <-simulateResiduals(lmmx, plot = T) # check for overdispersion
testResiduals(res) # tests distribution, dispersion and outliers, testUniformity() - tests if the overall distribution conforms to expectations
testDispersion(res) # tests under and overdispersion (big spread in data, red bar is way off of distribution of data (res))
testZeroInflation(res)
testOutliers(res, type = 'bootstrap')

# Results

summary(lmmx) # final model 

# Perform Type III ANOVA
glmm_table <- Anova(lmmx, type = "III")

# Convert to dataframe and add factor names
anova_df <- as.data.frame(glmm_table)
anova_df$Factor <- rownames(anova_df)

# Round Chi-sq and p-value columns
anova_df$Chisq <- round(anova_df$Chisq, 2)

# Round p-values and format small values (<0.001)
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- round(as.numeric(as.character(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`)), 3)  # round to 3 decimals
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- ifelse(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.001, "< 0.001", formatC(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`, format = "f", digits = 3))

# Reorder columns: Factor first
anova_df <- anova_df[, c("Factor", "Chisq", "Df", "Pr(>Chisq)")]

# Create flextable (no need for p_numeric in conditional formatting)
anova_ft <- flextable(anova_df) |> 
  set_header_labels(
    Factor = "Factor",
    Chisq = "Chi²",
    Df = "DF",
    `Pr(>Chisq)` = "p-value"
  ) |> 
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ as.numeric(as.character(`Pr(>Chisq)`)) < 0.05, part = "body")

# Post-hoc / pairwise comparisons using emmeans
emmeans_result <- emmeans(lmmx, pairwise ~ treatment, adjust = "tukey")
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_result$contrasts)

# Pairwise comparisons flextable
pairwise_ft <- flextable(emmeans_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = c("estimate", "SE", "t.ratio", "p.value"), digits = 3) |>
  set_header_labels(
    contrast = "Contrast", estimate = "Estimate", SE = "SE",
    df = "DF", t.ratio = "t-ratio", p.value = "p-value"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ p.value < 0.05, part = "body")

# CLD result
cld_result <- multcomp::cld(emmeans_result, adjust = "sidak", Letters = letters)
cld_df <- as.data.frame(cld_result)

# Compact letter display (CLD) flextable
cld_ft <- flextable(cld_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = "emmean", digits = 2) |>
  set_header_labels(
    treatment = "Treatment", emmean = "Estimated Mean", .group = "Group"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs()

# Export stats table to Word document
doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Table 1. Type III ANOVA Results", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(anova_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 2. Pairwise Comparisons (Tukey)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(pairwise_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 3. Compact Letter Display (CLD)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(cld_ft)

# Save to Word document
print(doc, target = "model_results_lat_root_count_control.docx")
```

###Sorbitol

```{r}
# sorbitol

data_sorbitol <- RSA %>%
  filter(media == "sorbitol") 

# Data distribution

aovx <- aov(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count ~ data_sorbitol$treatment)
shapiro.test(aovx$residuals)
#normaal

hist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count)

boxplot(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count)

# Visualize data
plotdist(log(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count))

# Test the different distributions
normal <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "norm")
summary(normal)

gamma <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "gamma") 
summary(gamma)

poisson <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "pois")
summary(poisson)

exponential <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "exp")
summary(exponential)

nonbinom <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "nbinom")
summary(nonbinom)

lnormal <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "lnorm")
summary(lnormal)

logi <- fitdist(data_sorbitol$Lateral_Root_Count, "logis")
summary(logi)

# Compare the different distributions
gofstat(list(normal, exponential, gamma, lnormal, logi, poisson, nonbinom), 
        fitnames=c("normal", "exponential", "gamma", "lnormal", "logis", "poisson", "nonbinom"))

# conclusion: normal

###### Generalized linear mixed models

lmmx <- glmmTMB(Lateral_Root_Count ~ treatment + (1|plate_id), 
                 data=data_sorbitol, na.action=na.omit,
                 family = gaussian())

plot(resid(lmmx))
plot(simulateResiduals(lmmx)) 

# Res Identification for batch
res <-simulateResiduals(lmmx, plot = T) # check for overdispersion
testResiduals(res) # tests distribution, dispersion and outliers, testUniformity() - tests if the overall distribution conforms to expectations
testDispersion(res) # tests under and overdispersion (big spread in data, red bar is way off of distribution of data (res))
testZeroInflation(res)
testOutliers(res, type = 'bootstrap')

# Results

summary(lmmx) # final model 

# Perform Type III ANOVA
glmm_table <- Anova(lmmx, type = "III")

# Convert to dataframe and add factor names
anova_df <- as.data.frame(glmm_table)
anova_df$Factor <- rownames(anova_df)

# Round Chi-sq and p-value columns
anova_df$Chisq <- round(anova_df$Chisq, 2)

# Round p-values and format small values (<0.001)
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- round(as.numeric(as.character(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`)), 3)  # round to 3 decimals
anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` <- ifelse(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)` < 0.001, "< 0.001", formatC(anova_df$`Pr(>Chisq)`, format = "f", digits = 3))

# Reorder columns: Factor first
anova_df <- anova_df[, c("Factor", "Chisq", "Df", "Pr(>Chisq)")]

# Create flextable (no need for p_numeric in conditional formatting)
anova_ft <- flextable(anova_df) |> 
  set_header_labels(
    Factor = "Factor",
    Chisq = "Chi²",
    Df = "DF",
    `Pr(>Chisq)` = "p-value"
  ) |> 
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ as.numeric(as.character(`Pr(>Chisq)`)) < 0.05, part = "body")

# Post-hoc / pairwise comparisons using emmeans
emmeans_result <- emmeans(lmmx, pairwise ~ treatment, adjust = "tukey")
emmeans_df <- as.data.frame(emmeans_result$contrasts)

# Pairwise comparisons flextable
pairwise_ft <- flextable(emmeans_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = c("estimate", "SE", "t.ratio", "p.value"), digits = 3) |>
  set_header_labels(
    contrast = "Contrast", estimate = "Estimate", SE = "SE",
    df = "DF", t.ratio = "t-ratio", p.value = "p-value"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs() |>
  bold(i = ~ p.value < 0.05, part = "body")

# CLD result
cld_result <- multcomp::cld(emmeans_result, adjust = "sidak", Letters = letters)
cld_df <- as.data.frame(cld_result)

# Compact letter display (CLD) flextable
cld_ft <- flextable(cld_df) |>
  colformat_double(j = "emmean", digits = 2) |>
  set_header_labels(
    treatment = "Treatment", emmean = "Estimated Mean", .group = "Group"
  ) |>
  autofit() |>
  theme_booktabs()

# Export stats table to Word document
doc <- read_docx() |>
  body_add_par("Table 1. Type III ANOVA Results", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(anova_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 2. Pairwise Comparisons (Tukey)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(pairwise_ft) |>
  
  body_add_par("Table 3. Compact Letter Display (CLD)", style = "heading 2") |>
  body_add_flextable(cld_ft)

# Save to Word document

print(doc, target = "model_results_lat_root_count_sorbitol.docx")


```
